mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 8.0% signals severe labor market weakness and contracting consumer demand, which forces equity valuations lower over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive 20d returns occur in >55% of instances when UNRATE exceeds 8.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and capital expenditure recovery, generating sustained positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative median 60d returns in out-of-sample backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth above its 12-month moving average during late-cycle expansions confirms resilient manufacturing output, triggering short-term momentum rallies in equities.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 when applied outside late-cycle regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index values erode real corporate margins and prompt expectations of tighter monetary policy, systematically depressing forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive correlation between CPIAUCSL growth and 20d returns exceeds 0.10 over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll gain exceeding 150,000 signals robust economic momentum and rising corporate revenues, driving immediate positive market repricing.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases by > 150k in a single month
failure_condition: Market returns are flat or negative following >150k payroll prints in >60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly GDP growth and monthly retail sales expansion confirm broad-based demand recovery, supporting higher equity valuations over a three-month horizon.
failure_condition: Combined positive signals fail to outperform the market baseline by >2% over 60 days.

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate hikes during a tightening cycle increase discount rates and trigger portfolio rebalancing away from equities, causing immediate negative short-term returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in >50% of rate hike instances during tightening regimes.
